title: Senior Teacher - Doubtnut Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Doubtnut Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the Doubtnut Advisory Limited family as a Senior Teacher in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Doubtnut Advisory Limited:
Doubtnut Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Doubtnut Advisory Limited!
